untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external macro data inputs (CPI YoY inflation rate, 10Y yield levels, PMI, jobless claims) that are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. The core logic depends on real-time economic data feeds and causal chain validation (inflation → rates → growth impact) which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Bollinger Bands, Donchian, Pivots). This is a fundamental macro-regime signal requiring external data sources, not a price-action-based rule.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 is a high-level conviction-building framework emphasizing fundamental economic linkages rather than formulaic technical patterns. Entry requires: (1) CPI YoY > 4%, (2) 10Y yield up 50+ bps from recent low, (3) PMI or jobless claims confirm slowdown. Exit on thesis breakdown or 8% drawdown. The signal cannot be translated to this backtest engine without adding macro data connectors (inflation indices, yield curves, employment data). Leverage multiplier 1.5x noted but not implementable in JSON schema.
